narrative:
Stock (precinct in Noble County) has 200 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.5 percentage points.
